scripts.bundle:plain: rnx-cli bundle --entry-file index.js --platform ios --dev false --minify true --bundle-output out/plain.min.bundle
scripts.bundle:treeshake: RNX_METRO_SERIALIZER_ESBUILD=1 rnx-cli bundle --entry-file index.js --platform ios --dev false --minify true --tree-shake --reset-cache --bundle-output out/treeshake.min.bundle --metafile out/meta.json
